name: Michigami Nareko
description:
Nareko Michigami (道神 馴子 Michigami Nareko) is a dousojin who can be found underground. She appeared as the Stage 3 boss in Fossilized Wonders.


The character is in development. Therefore, it may not correspond to the canon. Plus, the character in Fossiled Wonders is not finished due to the Trial.

Enjoy, and I hope there will be no problems.
creator: Nitai
